description: Add a custom Gradle task named 'generateBuildReport' to the 'app' module's build.gradle.kts file. The task must generate a JSON report at 'app/build/reports/build-report.json' containing the following build metadata keys: 'applicationId', 'versionName', 'versionCode', 'minSdk', 'targetSdk', 'compileSdk', 'buildTimestamp' (ISO 8601), 'javaVersion', and 'dependencyCount' (total declared dependencies in the app module). The task must be executable via './gradlew :app:generateBuildReport'.
